case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. JUSTIN M. COOPER et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: COMPUTATION OF ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
